heading: BI Connector for Atlas
body:
> **Important:** The MongoDB Connector for Business Intelligence for Atlas and on-premises reaches end-of-life (EOL) and will no longer be supported after September 2026.
> For all new projects, we recommend using the new MongoDB SQL Interface to
> connect to Atlas or Enterprise Advanced deployments.
> The SQL Interface offers improved performance, a simplified setup, and enhanced
> features. To learn more, see [Connect With SQL](sql-interface).

Excluding MongoDB Atlas Enterprise and MongoDB Atlas Platinum
customers, if BI Connector for Atlas is enabled for your cluster:

- The billing rate for the BI Connector for Atlas is described in the cluster console
  as a daily uplift on the cost of the associated cluster. You can
  view the rate when [Create a Cluster](create-new-cluster)
  or by modifying your cluster.

- BI Connector for Atlas has a sustained-usage pricing. That is, the daily rate is
  charged only up to a maximum for the month.
